description: Boys 3-Pack Minions Short-Sleeved T-Shirts Get ready for endless fun with this Boys 3-Pack of Minions short-Sleeved T-Shirts! Officially licensed Minions merchandise, these tees are perfect for young fans who love the hilarious and mischievous Minions. Made from 100% combed cotton (160gsm), these shirts are super soft, durable, and comfortable, making them ideal for everyday wear. Material: 100% combed cotton (160gsm) – soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. Sleeves: Ribbed cuffs for a snug fit and added style. Sizes: Available in a range of boys' sizes. Designs: Top 1: Colour: Yellow Design: Features two Minions Top 2: Colour: Grey Design: Features two minions with one eating a banana Top 3: Colour: White Design: Features multiple Minions across the shirt – perfect for your little trendsetter. These short-sleeved T-shirts are perfect for school, playdates, or just lounging at home, keeping your child stylish and comfortable while showcasing their favourite Minions characters! Furthermore, rest assured that our clothing is ethically and responsibly sourced in alignment with the Ethical Trading Initiative (ETI). We are committed to providing premium apparel while ensuring fair and ethical practices throughout the production process.
